seo_target.description: Every page fully indexed in Google with proper schema, unique content, keyword-optimised meta
requirements: Zero Sarkari Result branding in any page content
Unique 200+ word shortDescription per job (not copied from source)
JobPosting schema on every job page
Event schema on admit card pages
LearningResource schema on answer key pages
CollectionPage + ItemList schema on category listing pages
FAQ schema on all detail pages
Meta title ≤ 60 chars with primary keyword
Meta description ≤ 155 chars with org, vacancy count, last date
Canonical URL set on every page (done via buildMetadata)
Sitemap.xml with all URLs submitted to Google Search Console

problems.title: Insufficient job listings — ~243 jobs vs 3000+ on sarkariresult
problems.description: Target: all sarkariresult.com jobs, results, admit-cards from 2023 to present. Current: 243 jobs / 294 results / 242 admit-cards. Scraper runs 4x/day and agent clears seen_items when stale to force re-scrape.
actions: Scraper now runs 4x/day (7AM, 1PM, 7PM, 1AM IST)
Agent clears seen_items.json when content is stale to force full re-scrape
Agent writes scraper/run-now to trigger immediate re-run
MIN_POST_DATE set to 2023-01-01 — only 2023-present content
CF Worker proxy must be configured with CF_WORKER_PROXY_URL secret for scraper to bypass blocks

problems.title: SEO branding contamination — 218/243 job pages had Sarkari Result text
problems.description: Scraped howToApply and description fields contained raw 'Sarkari Result' mentions. Google treats this as duplicate/scraped content from sarkariresult.com, suppressing rankings and causing manual penalties.
actions: Agent Task 0 (PRIMARY): Full SEO rewrite of every MDX file every 3 hours
Generates unique 200-word shortDescription per job using job's own data fields
Replaces howToApply with clean Naukri Dhaba branded steps
Enriches body: lead paragraph + key details table + eligibility + steps + 5-Q FAQ
Agent Task 1: Fast-pass branding cleaner for any missed instances

problems.title: Schema markup missing on results, admit-cards, answer-keys, syllabus pages
problems.description: Only job pages had JobPosting schema. Results, admit-cards had only BreadcrumbList. Google cannot identify content type, reducing rich result eligibility.
problems.fix: Added LearningResource schema to result pages, Event schema to admit-card pages. Also added buildAnswerKeyJsonLd (LearningResource), buildSyllabusJsonLd (Course), buildListingPageJsonLd (CollectionPage+ItemList), buildFaqJsonLd to lib/seo.ts

problems.title: Google indexing failure — pages not appearing in Google index
problems.description: Root causes: (1) Sarkari Result duplicate content suppressed pages. (2) Thin content with no unique value. (3) Missing schema types. All three being fixed by agent.
actions: Fix P002 (branding) — agent runs every 3 hours
Fix schema markup — done (P003 resolved)
Submit sitemap.xml to Google Search Console manually
Use URL Inspection in GSC to request indexing for high-priority pages
IndexNow ping already wired in push_to_index.py — verify it's running

problems.title: Zero organic SEO traffic
problems.description: Consequence of P002 + P004. Once branding is clean and pages indexed, organic traffic will grow. Timeline: 4–8 weeks after indexing begins.
actions: Primary keyword in every meta title: {Job Name} {Year} Apply Online
Secondary keywords in description: vacancy count, org name, last date
FAQ schema on all detail pages — enables FAQ rich results
JobPosting schema on all job pages — enables job posting rich results
Internal linking: category pages link to all jobs, homepage links to latest
Content volume: reach 3000+ jobs so more long-tail keywords are covered

problems.title: Expired jobs showing Active badge
problems.description: lastDate values with trailing text broke date parsing.
problems.fix: Fixed parseDDMMYYYY() to use regex. Merged to main via PR #133.

problems.title: Google AdSense verification failing
problems.description: Script injected via JS not visible to AdSense crawler.
problems.fix: Replaced Next.js Script with plain <script async> in <head>. Merged to main via PR #134.
